jsonLd.title: Evok is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!
